title: Brick Features
description: Allows players to craft brick blocks easier and decorate bricks!
body:
# FEATURES

Brick features allows players to use their pickaxe to crack already existing stone blocks by right clicking said blocks.

Bricks that dropped after cracking them can be used on the corresponding block to repair them back into their original state



**Blocks**

- Cracked Endstone Bricks

- Cracked Red Nether Bricks

 

**Items**

- Stone Brick

- Red nether brick

- Deepslate Brick

- Deepslate tile

- Blackstone Brick

- Endstone Brick

# UPCOMING FEATURES

- Decorating bricks with snowballs to turn them snowy

- Applying moss to Stone bricks

- Applying magma to blackstone bricks 

# RECIPES
